defect: cotter pin omitted on castle nut
prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Suspension & steering, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: cotter pin omitted on castle nut. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: OEM, alignment specs. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: Measurement check: Suspension & steering (production floor)
